mapper.sql: t.id, t.notify_task_id, t.order_id, t.notify_type, t.receiver_type, t.receiver_id, t.receiver_address, t.content_template_code, t.send_status, t.retry_count, t.plan_send_time, t.send_time, t.fail_reason, t.create_time, t.create_by, t.modify_time, t.modify_by, t.row_version, t.row_valid
mapper.select: SELECT FROM vso_notify_task t WHERE t.order_id = #{orderId} AND t.row_valid = 1
SELECT FROM vso_notify_task t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vso_notify_task t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
AND t.order_id = #{params.orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vso_notify_task ( notify_task_id, order_id, notify_type, receiver_type, receiver_id, receiver_address, content_template_code, send_status, retry_count, plan_send_time, send_time, fail_reason, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{notifyTaskId}, #{orderId}, #{notifyType}, #{receiverType}, #{receiverId}, #{receiverAddress}, #{contentTemplateCode}, #{sendStatus}, #{retryCount}, #{planSendTime}, #{sendTime}, #{failReason}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )

INSERT INTO vso_notify_task ( notify_task_id, order_id, notify_type, receiver_type, receiver_id, receiver_address, content_template_code, send_status, retry_count, plan_send_time, send_time, fail_reason, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES
( #{item.notifyTaskId}, #{item.orderId}, #{item.notifyType}, #{item.receiverType}, #{item.receiverId}, #{item.receiverAddress}, #{item.contentTemplateCode}, #{item.sendStatus}, #{item.retryCount}, #{item.planSendTime}, #{item.sendTime}, #{item.failReason}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE vso_notify_task t SET
t.notify_type = #{notifyType},
t.receiver_type = #{receiverType},
t.receiver_id = #{receiverId},
t.receiver_address = #{receiverAddress},
t.content_template_code = #{contentTemplateCode},
t.send_status = #{sendStatus},
t.retry_count = #{retryCount},
t.plan_send_time = #{planSendTime},
t.send_time = #{sendTime},
t.fail_reason = #{failReason},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE t.id = #{id}
UPDATE vso_notify_task t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
